translations.en: Your creation turned out really well.
translations.it: La tua creazione è venuta davvero bene.
translations.vi: Tác phẩm của bạn thực sự rất đẹp.
translations.nl: Je creatie is echt goed gelukt.
translations.hu: Az alkotásod tényleg nagyon jól sikerült.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी कृति वाकई बहुत अच्छी बनी है.
translations.el: Η δημιουργία σου βγήκε πολύ καλά.
translations.ro: Creația ta a ieșit foarte bine.
translations.ja: あなたの作品は本当によくできている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies the noun 'création'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of degree; modifies the predicate adjective 'réussie'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), feminine singular; agrees with 'création' as predicate complement.

sentences.target: Je poste ma création sur Instagram.

translations.fr: Je poste ma création sur Instagram.
translations.en: I'm posting my creation on Instagram.
translations.es: Estoy publicando mi creación en Instagram.
translations.de: Ich poste mein Werk auf Instagram.
translations.it: Sto pubblicando la mia creazione su Instagram.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把我的作品发布在 Instagram 上。
translations.yue: 我而家喺 Instagram 上面發佈我嘅作品。
translations.ru: Я выкладываю свою работу в Instagram.
translations.pt: Estou postando minha criação no Instagram.
translations.he: אני מעלה את היצירה שלי לאינסטגרם.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đăng tác phẩm của mình lên Instagram.
translations.nl: Ik post mijn creatie op Instagram.
translations.uk: Я публікую свою роботу в Інстаграмі.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी कृति इंस्टाग्राम पर पोस्ट कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ανεβάζω τη δημιουργία μου στο Instagram.
translations.nb: Jeg legger ut verket mitt på Instagram.
translations.id: Aku sedang memposting karyaku di Instagram.
translations.sv: Jag postar min skapelse på Instagram.
translations.da: Jeg poster min kreation på Instagram.
translations.ja: インスタグラムに自分の作品を投稿しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'création'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'poste'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase indicating platform/location.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On goûte ta création au dessert.

translations.fr: On goûte ta création au dessert.
translations.en: We're tasting your creation for dessert.
translations.es: Estamos probando tu creación como postre.
translations.de: Wir probieren deine Kreation zum Nachtisch.
translations.it: Stiamo assaggiando la tua creazione come dessert.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在甜点时品尝你的作品。
translations.yue: 我哋食甜品時試吓你嘅作品。
translations.ru: Мы пробуем твоё творение на десерт.
translations.pt: Estamos provando a sua criação como sobremesa.
translations.he: אנחנו טועמים את היצירה שלך לקינוח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nếm thử tác phẩm của bạn làm món tráng miệng.
translations.nl: We proeven jouw creatie als toetje.
translations.uk: Ми куштуємо твій витвір на десерт.
translations.hi: हम मिठाई में तुम्हारी कृति चख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Δοκιμάζουμε τη δημιουργία σου για επιδόρπιο.
translations.nb: Vi smaker på kreasjonen din til dessert.
translations.id: Kami mencicipi karyamu sebagai hidangan penutup.
translations.sv: Vi smakar på din skapelse till efterrätt.
translations.da: Vi smager på din kreation til dessert.
translations.ja: デザートにあなたの作品をいただいています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/pragmatic subject pronoun (often meaning ‘we’), 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'création'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'goûte'.
Contracted preposition (‘à le’ → ‘au’) introducing a prepositional phrase functioning as an adjunct.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the course/time.

translations.en: This creation really looks like you.
translations.es: Esta creación se parece mucho a ti.
translations.de: Diese Kreation passt sehr gut zu dir.
translations.ru: Эта работа очень на тебя похожа.
translations.pt: Esta criação tem muito a ver com você.
translations.vi: Tác phẩm này rất hợp với bạn.
translations.nl: Deze creatie past heel goed bij jou.
translations.uk: Цей витвір дуже на тебе схожий.
translations.hu: Ez az alkotás nagyon illik hozzád.
translations.hi: यह कृति बिलकुल तुम्हारी जैसी लगती है.
translations.pl: To dzieło bardzo do ciebie pasuje.
translations.el: Αυτή η δημιουργία σου μοιάζει πολύ.
translations.nb: Denne kreasjonen passer deg veldig godt.
translations.sv: Den här skapelsen är verkligen du.
translations.ro: Această creație ți se potrivește foarte mult.
translations.cs: Tento výtvor se k tobě opravdu hodí.
translations.da: Denne kreation passer rigtig godt til dig.
translations.fi: Tämä luomus on todella sinun näköisesi.
translations.ja: この作品は本当にあなたらしい。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'création'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular, indirect object (dative) of 'ressembler'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an indirect object introduced by a clitic.
Adverb of degree; modifies the verb 'ressemble'.
